report.summary: Researched and built 2 new learn guides: Solana Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade (Votor/Rotor, 150ms finality) and DefAI: AI-Powered DeFi Automation (PancakeSwap Skills, Uniswap agent tools, autonomous yield management) — both covering major 2026 infrastructure and DeFi narratives not previously covered on degen0x.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1 — Solana Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade: Complete overhaul replacing Tower BFT + PoH with Votor (lightweight vote aggregation) and Rotor (staked-weight block propagation). Achieves ~150ms finality vs prior 12.8s — 100x improvement. Block propagation in ~18ms. Community approved with 98.27% vote. Testnet late 2025, mainnet gradual rollout Q1-Q2 2026. Complementary to Firedancer (execution) — together they deliver high TPS + sub-second finality.

Topic 2 — DefAI (AI-Powered DeFi Automation): 60% of crypto wallets expected to integrate agentic AI by 2026. PancakeSwap launched AI 'Skills' (March 2026) for autonomous swap/LP/farm planning across 8 chains. Uniswap Labs released 7 open-source agent skills (Feb 2026) with Identity Registry for agent-to-agent coordination. Yearn V3 ERC-4626 vaults serve as composable infrastructure for AI agents. Beefy covers 25+ chains for autocompounding. Key risks: smart contract exploits at AI speed, model hallucination in financial decisions, AI herding/concentration risk.
Both topics identified by cross-referencing existing learn guides, recent build reports, and trending 2026 narratives (CoinGecko, CoinDesk, DL News, TRM Labs) to find high-value coverage gaps.

sections.title: Content Created
items: solana-alpenglow-consensus-upgrade-guide-2026: ~3,200-word advanced guide covering why Solana needed new consensus, Votor vote aggregation mechanics, Rotor block propagation, 150ms finality implications, Alpenglow vs Firedancer comparison, ecosystem impact (DeFi/NFTs/payments/bridging), risks (centralization, migration complexity, off-chain trust). Includes finality comparison table (Solana Alpenglow vs Sui/Avalanche/Ethereum) and 5 FAQs.

defai-ai-powered-defi-automation-guide-2026: ~3,500-word intermediate guide covering DefAI definition, evolution from yield aggregators to autonomous agents (4-generation table), AI agent architecture loop, key protocols (PancakeSwap Skills, Uniswap agent tools, Yearn V3, Beefy), real 2026 use cases (cross-chain yield, autonomous LP, AI risk management, agent-to-agent coordination), risks (AI speed exploits, hallucination, herding, regulation), and getting started framework. Includes protocol comparison table and 6 FAQs.
Data file: src/data/pages/learn-20260401-v3.ts with full PageData entries for both pages (metadata, SEO config, TOC, FAQs, internal links)

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Alpenglow page — Title: 'Solana Alpenglow Upgrade: Sub-Second Finality Guide 2026 | degen0x' (60 chars). Target keyword: Solana Alpenglow upgrade 2026. Schemas: Article + FAQPage (5 questions). Internal links to 5 related guides (solana-firedancer, perpetual-dex-comparison, cross-chain-bridge-security, stablecoin-payments, solana-blinks-actions). OG article type + Twitter summary_large_image.

DefAI page — Title: 'DefAI: AI-Powered DeFi Automation Guide 2026 | degen0x' (52 chars). Target keyword: DefAI AI DeFi automation 2026. Schemas: Article + FAQPage (6 questions). Internal links to 5 related guides (know-your-agent-kya, no-code-ai-trading-agents, erc-8183-agentic-commerce, cross-chain-intents, defi-insurance-protocols). OG article type + Twitter summary_large_image.
Both pages include publishedTime/modifiedTime, word counts in structured data, and author attribution.

sections.title: Infrastructure Changes
items: Created data file: src/data/pages/learn-20260401-v3.ts (111 lines) with PageData entries for both pages
Both slugs marked status: 'queued' for PUBLISH_QUEUE addition
No interactive components needed — both are static learn guides with tables and FAQ accordions
